metadata.description: Generate a complete, client-ready brand/design system as a single-file HTML page from a website URL — scrape real colours & fonts, build the system, deploy to Netlify.

plugins.name: design-system-generator
plugins.description: URL -> real palette/fonts (WP-noise filtered) -> single-file HTML design system (hero, colour, type, components, signature blocks, proposal bridge) -> Netlify deploy. The B2B Global client design-system flow.
